offer: For insurance claims processors handling 10–20 claims/month, discrepancies in reimbursements cause cash flow gaps. We provide an auditing service instead of manual audits and spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance claims processors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 claims processors with demo video
Join community forums for sharing tools among processors
try_it: Let users try manual discrepancy flagging and reporting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
